title: The World Is Our Dance Floor
overview: Exactly one year after a tragedy, a young writer carries on through the night as though it were any other. What first appears ordinary gradually reveals itself as something far more fragile.

title: A Thing of the Past
overview: A pharmaceutical trial promises Aya her lost memories, but as they return, her body begins to manifest them in disturbing ways.

title: First to Fifty
overview: Guided by a legendary figure of the Finnish wood throwing game, a group of mates form Australia’s first ever team to compete at the Mölkky World Championships.

title: Sound of Falling
overview: Four adolescent girls each spend their youth in the same farmhouse over the last century. Though separated by decades, resonances between their lives emerge: their desires and distress, secrets and truths, encounters with another’s gaze and defiant gaze in return.

title: Scary Movie
overview: Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer, the Core Four are back in the killer's crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe.

title: Colony
overview: Se-jeong, a biotechnology professor, attends a biotech conference—only to witness it spiral into catastrophe when a rapidly mutating virus is unleashed. As the outbreak spreads and the infected begin to transform, authorities seal off the entire facility, trapping the survivors with an ever-growing threat.

title: When Worlds Collide
overview: Lana Maxwell becomes the prime suspect in the murder of her friend Veronica. Watch as her life unfolds and she deals with the challenges that being a teenager brings. Meanwhile Evelyn Jackson is going through friend group problems, and decides to make friends with a controversial figure.

title: Disclosure Day
overview: If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you?

title: Gemini
overview: As a career-defining performance approaches, a young composer becomes unsettled by a piece of music that seems to surface unbidden, drawing him into a confrontation with his own self-doubt.

title: If You had Stayed
overview: After a tragic choice leads him to the brink, a disillusioned artist named Michael awakens on a mysterious beach. a liminal space where lost souls come to confront their pasts. Guided by Bob, a charismatic yet enigmatic caretaker, Michael embarks on a surreal journey through the pivotal moments of his life: love, heartbreak, and devastating loss. As he confronts hidden truths and unspoken regrets, Michael is faced with one profound question: Was it worth it, and what would life be like if he had stayed?

title: Jackass 5
overview: The fifth installment in the “Jackass” movie series. Plot TBA.
